abilities.shortEffect: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes half as much damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

This Pokémon's Attack is doubled while in battle.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

This ability functions identically to Pure Power.

abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Grass-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.
